content.en:
Before the endless years, the Realm God Realm was actually inferior to the Eternal Realm, and it was a subsidiary realm of the Eternal Realm, but with the change of the Eternal Realm and the death zone, countless forces moved to the Realm God Realm, and also transferred the origin of the Eternal Realm to the Realm God Realm.

Now, the Realm God Realm has surpassed the Eternal Realm at its peak, and the Eternal Realm has become the Nether Realm of the Realm God Realm.

However, the Realm God Realm also does not want all the realms of the Eternal Realm to relocate there, in that case, it will undoubtedly squeeze the resources and living space of the Realm God Realm.

Therefore, only occasionally a small number of places fall on the heads of some powerful eternal kingdoms.

"Lord Qinhe, I won't give up the Endless Realm for the time being. "

Ye Tian showed his attitude.

The other country lords were not surprised, after all, Ye Tiancai had not been rising for a long time, and the human race was sitting on two eternal realms, so he was naturally not in a hurry to go to the realm of the gods.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian asked again, "Lord of Qinhe, how can an eternal realm enter the realm of the Realm of Gods?"

The Lord of Qin River said: "First of all, you have to have an Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse apply, and after you get permission, you can participate in the quota. As for whether or not you can get the quota in the end, it depends on the strength of the Eternal Realm, and I don't know exactly how to evaluate it. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian knew that the Endless Realm was definitely hopeless at the moment, after all, there was no Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse behind the Endless Realm.

"Then, only if I break through to the Eternal Realm God Realm in the future, can I send the Endless Kingdom to the Realm God Realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After that, the lords present discussed the matter of the kingdom of all gods going to attack the realm of gods.

It is conceivable that in the future, many Eternal Dao Realms, in order to enter the realm of the gods, will definitely choose to join the kingdom of all gods, which will also enhance the strength of the kingdom of all gods, so that the kingdom of all gods will have a greater hope of impacting into the realm of gods.

But this matter has nothing to do with Ye Tian or the human race.

He is not in a hurry to go to the realm of the gods now.

......

After returning from the National Lord's Conference, Ye Tian worked hard to refine the Eternal Demon Pillar, create more Dao Secret Techniques, and improve his strength in all aspects.

And soon after, many Eternal Dao Realms have joined the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods, and even within the Endless Kingdom, there are some Eternal Dao Realms who choose to join the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods, this joining is not as simple as relocating, but needs to be registered in the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods, and it is considered a member of the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods, and it is completely joined to the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods.

Like within the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods, many ordinary cultivators are not considered to have joined the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods, and they must register, otherwise once the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods really wants to relocate, this group of cultivators will not be qualified to go there.

Unconsciously, another hundreds of millions of years have passed.

At this time, the kingdom of stars has been opened, and many forces have poured into the endless kingdom, but they are all not too powerful forces, and many powerful forces have joined the kingdom of all gods.

It can be said that this wave of operations in the Kingdom of All Gods has skyrocketed its strength.

Of course.

Ye Tian will not be jealous, it is only useful if his personal strength is strong, otherwise no matter how many forces join the Eternal Realm, it will not be of much help, after all, these forces are not of the same mind as himself.

Unconsciously, hundreds of millions of years have passed, and the kingdom of stars has gradually developed.

And at this time, the Lord of Qinhe left the realm of all gods with a group of strong men, and before leaving, he asked Ye Tian to pay more attention to the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss.

"It seems that the Lord of Qinhe is competing for the quota to enter the realm of the gods~~!"

Ye Tian guessed.

He didn't go over, after all, he wasn't a member of the kingdom of gods.

Not long after, the Lord of Qinhe came back, and soon announced the good news, that is, the Kingdom of Ten Thousand Gods has obtained the quota to enter the realm of the Realm of Gods, and the entire Kingdom of Ten Thousand Gods will move away.

As soon as this news came out, many forces wanted to join the kingdom of all gods, but it was too late at this time.

The Kingdom of Ten Thousand Gods doesn't want these Eternal Dao Realms, after all, for the Lord of Qinhe, these Eternal Dao Realms are useless, and they can't enhance his strength, and bringing them over will be a waste of their resources.

Soon after, those cultivators were driven away, and from this day on, the entire kingdom of all gods will no longer allow any forces and cultivators to enter, and it will be completely closed.

Hundreds of thousands of years later, the kingdom of the gods announced that it was going to move.

And before leaving, the Lord of Qinhe summoned Ye Tian and them.

"Ladies and gentlemen, the Alliance of the Kingdom of the Gods will depend on you in the future!"

The Lord of Qin River said.

"Don't worry, Lord Qinhe, we will hold here!" said one country lord after another.

The Lord of Qinhe nodded and said, "Okay, if I break through to the Eternal Realm God Realm in the future, you can contact me if you need help." But before I broke through to the Eternal Realm God Realm, I couldn't easily leave the Realm God Realm. "

After that, the Lord of Qinhe chatted for a while before choosing to leave.

......

this day.

The entire kingdom of the gods was in turmoil, and Ye Tian immediately shuttled over to take a look.

Many Eternal Dao realms have stood outside the realm of the gods and looked at the entire kingdom of the gods.

In a flash.

A huge crack appeared, and the eternal decree of the kingdom of the gods appeared, releasing a strong light that seemed to illuminate the entire kingdom of the gods.

At this time, a shroud appeared in the kingdom of all gods, protecting the entire eternal kingdom.

This mask is somewhat similar to the one used when the Eternal Kingdom was opened, but now it is reappearing.

As soon as this light mask came out, even the top-level Eternal Dao Realm would not be able to break in.

Click!!!

The kingdom of all gods was separated from the earth, and gradually flew up, drilling towards the crack in the void.

This is the direct transfer of the entire kingdom of gods to the realm of the gods, this is the relocation.

Suddenly, the grave.

An Eternal Dao Realm powerhouse shuttled directly to the past to enter the realm of the gods through that rift.

This Eternal Dao Realm was still hesitant and did not choose to join the Kingdom of All Gods, but now he wanted to join, but he was rejected by the Kingdom of All Gods.

Obviously, he wanted to smuggle into the realm of the gods.

"This guy is looking for death!"

A lord muttered.

Suddenly.

A force emerged from the side of the crack, instantly freezing this Eternal Dao Realm.

Immediately after, the body of this Eternal Dao Realm began to shatter, and it turned into ashes in the middle of his breath.

This is the Eternal Dao Realm of an Eternal Dao Body, and he died like this.
